title: On Iran’s Rugged Frontier, Kurds Yearn to Join the Fight
summary_full: These groups’ dream has long been to establish federal autonomy, akin to that of their fellow Kurds in Iraq. With Iran’s leaders battered and degraded, they hope their moment has come.
